title: Mighty Eagle. Supposed To Be Addressed To William Godwin.
content:
Mighty eagle! thou that soarest
    O'er the misty mountain forest,
    And amid the light of morning
    Like a cloud of glory hiest,
    And when night descends defiest
    The embattled tempests' warning!
meaning:
"Mighty Eagle. Supposed To Be Addressed To William Godwin." is a quintessential example of Percy Bysshe Shelley's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
